query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.paymentStatus, o.createdAt, p.id as paymentId, p.status as paymentStatus, p.slipImageUrl FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.id = p.orderId WHERE o.userId = 3 ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
